required_columns: donor_id; gene_* columns or approved gene identifier columns
notes: Primary baseline input. One row per donor. No cell-level rows. Gene columns must be numeric expression features.
Labels must match the approved binary target and must align exactly to the donor universe.
Must reproduce the same donor-level split policy used by primary evaluation. role must identify train/test or analysis-equivalent held-out role.
Must document all included and excluded donors.
Must define fold-local preprocessing and model configuration.
Required only for secondary composition-control baseline.
Allowed only for optional sensitivity baseline with pre-registered or fold-local feature selection.
Must hash every input artifact used for Stage 8G and Stage 8H.
Must capture reproducibility context for baseline construction.
